since_last: 73% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +5.84%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 73% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.55% · BTC -2.54% · Gold +0.90% · Nasdaq100 +1.60%. 73% of 84 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +5.84%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +5.84%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.96%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CEVA is the standout at +14.13%
cards.body: Leaders: CEVA +14.13%, AMBA +11.72%, AMD +9.57%, ANET +9.48%, VRT +9.03%. Laggards: AVAV -6.18%, UPST -3.54%, INTU -3.47%, WDAY -3.42%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.31% at $162.5
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.31% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
